reference: Hi, I fell and grazed my knee a month ago, and my wound has mostly healed but is still reddish and has left a bump. Last week, it developed a rash around the wound area, and the rash has pus. What should I do to treat it, and how can I minimize the appearance of a scar?
text: Hi, I fell and grazed my knee a month ago and my wound has mostly healed but is still reddish and has left a bump. Last week it developed a rash around the wound area and the rash has pus. What should I do to treat it and how can I minimize the appearance of a scar?
